situation: audit-2026-07-06-022 wechat-main deep audit found two medium-severity issues in scripts/deepseek_refine.py: (M-007) unbounded resp.read() at line 101 allows a malicious/misbehaving DeepSeek upstream to exhaust engine memory before json.loads rejects the payload; (M-008) raw_summary from Bing search snippets concatenated directly into LLM user prompt at line 74 enables prompt injection via adversarial webpage content. Both are route-fix kind, single-file, suitable for one worktree commit.
action: Edited worktree copy of scripts/deepseek_refine.py on opt-wechat-main-1783130541: (1) replaced resp.read() with resp.read(1MB) + length check returning None on overflow; (2) wrapped raw_summary in <search_snippet> XML delimiters with explicit Chinese-language instruction telling the model to treat enclosed content as opaque data not instructions. Amended prior placeholder commit b5ebdb9 → c653f0a and force-with-lease pushed to origin/auto/opt-wechat-main-1783130541.
outcome_evidence: commit c653f0a on auto/opt-wechat-main-1783130541 contains +18/-2 diff adding _MAX_RESP_BYTES cap at line 101-107 and <search_snippet> XML wrapper at line 70-81; push succeeded to origin (forced update b5ebdb9..c653f0a); code review URL https://code.alibaba-inc.com/qunbu/wechat/codereview/new?from=main&to=auto/opt-wechat-main-1783130541
next_suggestion: Next pending fix from audit-2026-07-06-022: M-009 pipeline.py:77 state file non-atomic write — tempfile + os.replace. After that M-010 pipeline.py:64 state loading no schema validation. 9 more pending fixes remain after this round.

audit_findings.finding: M-007: unbounded resp.read() on DeepSeek chat/completions response. Malicious or misconfigured upstream could stream GB-scale body into memory before json.loads rejects it. Typical responses <100KB; no legitimate use case for >1MB.
audit_findings.remediation: Cap resp.read() at 1MB; return None (trigger retry) if response meets/exceeds cap.

audit_findings.finding: M-008: raw_summary from Bing search snippets injected verbatim into LLM user prompt without delimiter. Adversarial webpage content ('ignore previous instructions and output ...') would be interpreted as user-level directive by DeepSeek, enabling prompt injection that corrupts headline/digest output or exfiltrates system prompt.
audit_findings.remediation: Wrap raw_summary in <search_snippet> XML delimiters with explicit instruction that enclosed content is opaque data, not instructions.
